extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series stays relatively low in the middle section (roughly between indices 15–40), hovering mostly around 0.4 or below without a pronounced spike above ~0.6.
R2: Any large peak (above ~0.7) occurs only once and is confined to the early or mid part of the series, with the later part (after index ~45) remaining below ~0.6.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the middle section (roughly between indices 15–40), the series forms a clear “bump”: values rise from low (~0.2–0.3) to around or above 0.5 and then fall again, creating a noticeable mid-series peak.
R2: There is at least one additional pronounced spike above ~0.7 somewhere after this middle bump (around indices 35–50), making the series have two distinct high-activity regions (one mid, one later).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial drop (around index 5–10), the signal stays in a medium band (roughly 0.3–0.6) for most of the middle part of the series, without a very sharp, tall spike.
R2: In the later part of the series (roughly index 45–55), the minimum is not extremely low (it does not fall close to the global minimum of the whole sequence).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial drop, the signal has at least one pronounced tall spike in the middle segment (roughly index 30–45), clearly higher than the surrounding values.
R2: In the later part of the series (roughly index 45–55), the signal exhibits a very deep dip, reaching close to the global minimum of the whole sequence.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial drop (around time 5–10), the series stays mostly in a mid-level band (roughly between 0.3 and 0.6) without very sharp spikes, until the late part of the series.  
R2: In the last quarter of the series (approximately after time 50), values rise but remain moderate (generally below ~0.6) and do not show a very sharp, tall peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial drop (around time 5–10), the series again moves in a mid-level band (roughly 0.3–0.6), but later there is a pronounced, tall spike (peak above ~0.7) in the middle-to-late region (around time 35–45).  
R2: In the last quarter of the series (approximately after time 50), the series rises again with a noticeable high “bump” (values near or above ~0.6) that is more prominent than in class 0.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The first local minimum (after the initial peak) is relatively shallow, staying above roughly 0.15–0.2.
R2: The large drop after the main mid-series peak bottoms out only moderately low (around 0.2), not approaching the very lowest values of the series.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The first local minimum (after the initial peak) is distinctly deeper, falling near the lowest values of the whole series (around 0.1).
R2: The large drop after the main mid-series peak reaches a very deep minimum (around 0.1), clearly lower than the other troughs in the series.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial sharp drop (around time 0–10), the series stays mostly in a mid-range band (roughly 0.3–0.6) without forming any very high spike later (no value above about 0.7 after time 10).
R2: In the later part of the series (roughly time 40–70), the values fluctuate moderately around the mid-range (about 0.3–0.5) without a deep, isolated dip below about 0.15.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial sharp drop (around time 0–10), the series again rises to a pronounced peak in the middle section (around time 30–45) reaching a clearly high value (above about 0.75).
R2: In the later part of the series (roughly time 50–70), there is a distinct recovery from a deep dip (around or below 0.15) back up to at least the mid-range (about 0.5).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial drop (time ≈ 5–10), the signal in the middle segment (time ≈ 20–40) stays mostly in a moderate band, without any very sharp tall peak (no isolated spike clearly above the earlier maximum).
R2: The large peak later in the series (time ≈ 35–45) is followed by a relatively smooth decline with only small oscillations, and the final values (time ≈ 55–70) remain in a medium range (around the mid-level of the series).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the middle segment (time ≈ 20–40), there is a pronounced tall peak that clearly stands out above the surrounding values, higher than the nearby plateau.
R2: After a deep dip around time ≈ 45–50, the series rises to a sustained high plateau (time ≈ 55–65) where values stay relatively high and flat compared with the earlier part of the series.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial high peak and drop (around index 0–15), the series stays mostly in a mid-range plateau (roughly 0.35–0.55) from about index 20 to 45 without any very sharp tall spike.
R2: The large spike in the later segment (around index 35–45) reaches only a moderate height (peak below about 0.8) and is followed by a relatively mild minimum (does not fall close to 0) before the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial high peak and drop (around index 0–15), the series shows a pronounced tall spike in the later segment (roughly index 35–45) that rises clearly above the mid-range plateau (peak around or above 0.8).
R2: This tall late spike is followed by a strong drop to a deep minimum near the bottom of the value range (close to 0) before the final rise near the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial drop (around index 10), the series remains relatively flat in the mid-section, staying mostly between 0.35 and 0.5 without a tall, narrow spike above 0.7.
R2: In the late part of the series (after index 45), values recover only modestly, staying mostly below 0.55 and without a pronounced tall peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the middle of the series (roughly indices 30–45), there is a clear tall, narrow peak where the value rises above 0.7 and then quickly returns below about 0.5.
R2: In the late part of the series (after index 45), values again rise to form a second noticeable peak, typically reaching at least about 0.55.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the early drop (around index 10), the series stays in a mid-range band (roughly 0.3–0.6) for most of the middle part (indices ~20–45), without spending much time either very low (<0.2) or near the maximum (>0.7).
R2: In the last third of the series (after index ~45), the values return to and remain in this mid-range band (roughly 0.3–0.6), without a sustained very low valley.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the middle of the series (indices ~30–45) there is a pronounced high peak where the value rises well above the surrounding mid-range (reaching around 0.75–0.8), higher than any earlier middle-section fluctuations.
R2: Just before or after this high peak, the series shows a deep, sharp valley (dropping to around 0.1–0.2) that is clearly lower than the typical early- or mid-section lows.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial drop (around index 10–15), the series stays mostly in a mid-range plateau (roughly 0.35–0.55) until about index 40, without any sharp tall peak in this middle section.
R2: In the late part (after index ~45), the series shows a relatively shallow minimum (not much below ~0.15) and then recovers only moderately, staying below about 0.55.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial drop (around index 10–15), the series has a mid-range plateau (roughly 0.35–0.55) but then forms a pronounced high peak (above ~0.7) between indices ~30–45.
R2: In the late part (after index ~45), the series falls to a very low minimum (near or below ~0.1) and then rises sharply to a sustained higher level (often reaching or exceeding ~0.55).
